name: SIX plus BAR L

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E1CEA138-A9C4-454D-BDB1-E542D7AA98C3

comment:
SIX+ BAR L: The SIX+ BAR L represents an innovative line of creative LED batten solutions that harmonizes the latest in LED color technology with versatile design for greater artistic expression. An upgrade of Elation’s beloved SixBar 1000, the SIX+ BAR L raises the bar with more output, a broader color spectrum and an overall superior quality of light. 
Equipped with 20W RGB+Lime+Amber+UV LEDs and boasting an impressive CRI of 93, the SIX+ BAR L offers a stunning array of colors, ensuring a beautifully homogenized wash of light with high-quality color reproduction. Its meticulously engineered optical system ensures even light distribution, and the proprietary RGBLA+UV engine delivers high-fidelity whites and intense primaries with no color fringing. Extra-large 50 mm lenses make it ideal for direct view applications and individual cell control opens up for a myriad of design possibilities.

slots.name: RED + GREEN + BLUE + WHITE + AMBER + UV

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

gwSpecs.description:
The SIX+ BAR L represents an innovative line of creative LED batten solutions that harmonizes the latest in LED color technology with versatile design for greater artistic expression. An upgrade of Elation’s beloved SixBar 1000, the SIX+ BAR L raises the bar with more output, a broader color spectrum and an overall superior quality of light. 
Equipped with 20W RGB+Lime+Amber+UV LEDs and boasting an impressive CRI of 93, the SIX+ BAR L offers a stunning array of colors, ensuring a beautifully homogenized wash of light with high-quality color reproduction. Its meticulously engineered optical system ensures even light distribution, and the proprietary RGBLA+UV engine delivers high-fidelity whites and intense primaries with no color fringing. Extra-large 50 mm lenses make it ideal for direct view applications and individual cell control opens up for a myriad of design possibilities.
